decision: Eng review (FULL_REVIEW): Notification module cleared with post-send dedup, retry on 5xx/429, 4xx fatal, message truncation, PUBLIC_BASE_URL fallback
rationale: Minimally invasive Feishu webhook integration into existing Notifier class; preserves pipeline stability and avoids permanent silence on transient failures

decision: Eng review (FULL_REVIEW): 7 issues across Architecture/CodeQuality/Tests/Performance all resolved. Key architectural decisions: (1) signal_fingerprint includes URL to prevent same-day same-title collision, (2) fetch_since returns (signals, watermark) tuple, (3) source_state uses generic (source, path, watermark) table, (4) signal_runs uses 4-step SQLite PK migration to (quarter, job), (5) daily job partial failure → continue with frontend提示. Scope: full 7 build items, research_view and macro_view allowed to degrade.
rationale: All architecture calls grounded in existing code patterns (SignalSource Protocol, AsyncIOScheduler, _safe_fetch pattern). No new frameworks.
